allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 1 --short-name "antra-log" "Antra Log - digital bullet journal with personal CRM for daily logging and relationship tracking")
Bash(flutter pub upgrade drift drift_flutter drift_dev)

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json "Build the task lifecycle and review flow for Antra. Core task philosophy: tasks should not disappear when unfinished, support intentional review and migration, hybrid daily carry-over with visible marking, weekly review for older tasks. Daily flow shows today entries plus carried-over unfinished tasks from yesterday with quick actions \(complete, keep, schedule, backlog, cancel, convert to note\). Weekly Review for tasks older than 7 days. Full migration history tracking per task. Task states: active, completed, canceled, backlog plus derived states. UI: Today screen with From Yesterday section, Task Detail screen with lifecycle history, Weekly Review screen." --number 2 --short-name "task-lifecycle")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json "Build a complete Personal CRM feature for Antra. Help users track people and interactions in a lightweight bullet-journal-friendly way. Every log entry can be linked to a person, and each person has a detail view showing full interaction history." --number 3 --short-name "personal-crm")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 4 --short-name "person-detail-view" "Design and implement the Person Detail View for a Personal CRM app with summary-first structure, relationship insights, recent activity preview, pinned notes, and dedicated full activity timeline with pagination.")
Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 5 --short-name "task-carryover" "Carried-over task behavior and quick-action task cards for Antra daily log")
Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json "Feature: AI-style Day View with Relationship Briefing and Morphing Cards:*)
